titleStmt.title: SII 27.140: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 140. (A.R. No. 504 of 1928-29.) KŌṬE, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up on a platform inside the maṇḍapa of Mahālingēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1385, Svabhānu, Jyēshṭha ba. 11, Sunday corresponding to 1463 A.D., June 12.

It states that 14 kāṭi-gadyāna representing the ayanavarttane due to the king from the temple of Mahālingēśvara at Kōṭe was endowed to the same temple under the orders of the king by mahāpradhāna, hegaḍe Lakhaṇṇa the governor of Bārakūru-rājya, to be utilised for the merit of the king and also of Rāmachandra-daṇṇāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . śrī sarasvatyāyēṁ namaḥ
nirvighnamastu namastuṁga śi
raścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1385 ne
ya vartamāna svabhānu saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭa ba 11 Ā lū śrīmanmahārā
ja paramēśvara śrī vīra pratāpa mallikārjuna mahārāyaru vija
yanagariya siṁhāsanadalu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ sakala varna
dharmāśramaṁgaḷanū pratipālisuva kāladalū Ā mahārā
yara nirūpadiṁ mahāpradhāna hegeḍelakhaṁṇagaḷu bārakū
ra rājyavanū Āḷuvakāladalū Ā mahārāyara nirūpadiṁ
kōṭadi grāmada voḷagaṇa hiriya dēvālyada śrīmahāliṁgadēvari
ge pradōṣa pūjege māḍida dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare Āma
llikārjuna mahārāyarigeU rāmacaṁdra daṇāyakarigeU
Āyurārōgya AyaśvaryābhiUradhiyāgabēkeṁdu pradōṣa pū
jege Ā mahādēvariṁda Aramanege baha Ayana vartaneya kāṭiya
ga 14 hadināku hoṁnanu prativaruṣa Ūṁdakaṁ ti 12 kari pra
yipatta nālkaṁ paṁcāmṛta Abhiṣēka puṣpāṁjali nayiu
ḷagaṇa ḷiya dēvige prati pradōṣadalā jana Ayidakke brā
hmaṇa bhōjana sahavāgi māḍida dharmakke Ā Ayanavarttaneyara
ha kāṭi hadinālku hoṁnanu sahiraṁṇyōdaka dā
na dhārāpūrvakavāgi Ā caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi dhāreya
neṟadukoṭu barasta śilāśāsana yī pradōṣapūjeya dharma
vanu Āga ru hegeḍeyi
dava da sēnabōva kāpuva Ayinaru
bopa hegeḍe lakhaṁṇagaḷanu hastada
śrī viśvanātha dānapālayōrmadhyē dānātraiyōnu pālanaṁ
dānātsvaggamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ yīdharmake Ā
robaru Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiyali sāvirada yiṁnūṟu ka
vileya koṁda dōṣake hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 27.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
